revision.comment: {{Navseasoncats}} {{Non-diffusing subcategory|{{title decade}}s deaths}} [[Category:Suicides by decade|{{title decade}}]] [[Category:{{title decade}}s deaths|*]] [[Category:19th-century suicides]]
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "Category:{" to "Category:"
Text replacement - "Category:{" to "Category:"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Suicides by decade]]
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
revision.text:
{{Navseasoncats}} {{Non-diffusing subcategory|{{title decade}}s deaths}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]]
[[Category:title decade}}s deaths|*]] [[Category:19th-century suicides]] [[sn:1870s suicides]]}} [[Category:Categories with 1 members]]
[[en:Category:1870s suicides]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Navseasoncats}} {{Non-diffusing subcategory|{{title decade}}s deaths}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:title decade}}s deaths|*]] [[Category:19th-century suicides]] [[sn:1870s suicides]]}} [[Category:Categories with 1 members]] [[en:Category:1870s suicides]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
revision.text: {{Navseasoncats}} {{Non-diffusing subcategory|{{title decade}}s deaths}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:title decade}}s deaths|*]] [[Category:19th-century suicides]] [[sn:1870s suicides]]}} [[Category:Categories with 1 members]] [[en:Category:1870s suicides]] [[en:Category:1870s suicides]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories

Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories

Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q104471126)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Navseasoncats}} {{Non-diffusing subcategory|{{title decade}}s deaths}} {{wikidata link|Q104471126}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:1870s suicides]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TEST1870s suicides]] [[Category:19th-century suicides]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:title decade}}s deaths|*]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1870s_suicides here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
